request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how overblown civil defense programs drain resources from real security needs. We don't need fancy bunkers - we need smart investments in border security and cyber defense. Our tax dollars should go to what actually protects us, not feel-good preparedness gimmicks. #NationalSecurityFirst
